assistant.title: AI assistant
assistant.emptyChat: Ask about planning, task wording, or priorities.
assistant.configHint: For production, set VITE_HELLOWORD_BASE_URL at build time (.env.production or GitHub Actions secret). In dev: npm run dev:worker and npm run dev — /api/helloword proxy.

landing.heroTitle: Manage tasks with AI — not micromanagement
landing.heroLead: One calm flow: planning without pressure, clear priorities, and help where it actually matters.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.description: Sign in to keep working with boards and tasks.
signIn.pendingEmail: Account created. Open the email and confirm it — then sign in with the same password.
signIn.registeredOk: Registration succeeded. Sign in to your account.
signIn.oauthFail: Google sign-in did not finish. Try again or use email and password.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.description: A few fields — then you can catch the vibe with AI Vibe Board.
signUp.loggedInHint: You are signed in as {{email}}. To register someone else or another email, sign out of the current account.
signUp.logoutAndNew: Sign out and register another account
signUp.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signUp.syncFail: Could not finish sign-in after registration. Try signing in manually on the Sign in page.

errors.profileLoad: Could not load profile. Please try again.

list.title: Boards
list.subtitle: Your boards and columns — in one calm place.
list.inviteHint: Your own boards and boards you were invited to. The owner can add members by email (they must already have an account in the app).
list.hintsBody: Smart recommendations for tasks and priorities will arrive in a future update.
list.empty: No boards yet — click “Add board” to create the first one.
list.setupStep2: Paste the full supabase/create_boards.sql file from the repo into the query and click Run.
list.setupCli: Or from the project root: npm run db:apply-boards (needs SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN in .env.local).
list.createLead: The board is stored in Supabase and linked to your user.
list.createDescPh: Briefly, what this board is for
list.deleteBoardConfirmBody: Board “{{name}}” and all its tasks will be permanently removed.

detail.boardMissing: Board not found or no access.
detail.searchNoResults: No tasks match this search. Change the query or clear the filter.
detail.deleteColumnConfirmBody: Column “{{name}}” will be removed. Tasks stay on the board; their column link will be cleared.
detail.columnApiHint: The API stage sets the task status field in the database (todo / doing / done).

modals.attachmentNotImage: Only images are allowed (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP).
modals.attachmentMaxCount: No more than {{max}} images per task.
modals.aiWorkerOff: Set VITE_HELLOWORD_BASE_URL or in dev run the worker (npm run dev:worker) and the dev server with /api/helloword proxy.
modals.aiNeedText: Enter a title or description (the main task) first.
modals.aiEmptySubtasks: No subtasks with a title. Try splitting again.

account.title: Account
account.lead: You’re in. Your task flow with AI hints will live here — calm, without noise.
account.name: Name
account.nextBody: Soon: boards, columns, and smart tips — same vibe as the landing page.
account.footerHint: Creating columns and cards — in upcoming iterations.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: Theme, notifications, and account options — as the product matures.
settings.appearanceBody: Light and dark themes, accents, and premium styling will appear here.
settings.notificationsBody: Email and reminder settings — in future iterations.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or was moved.

errors.tasksTable: The tasks table is missing. Run supabase/create_tasks.sql or npm run db:apply-tasks.
errors.boardColumnsTable: The board_columns table is missing. Run supabase/create_board_columns.sql or npm run db:apply-board-columns.
errors.columnSectionMigration: Board column sections migration required. Run npm run db:apply-board-column-section.
errors.cardColorColumn: The card_color column is missing on tasks. Run supabase/add_task_card_color.sql or npm run db:apply-task-card-color.
errors.attachmentUrlsColumn: The attachment_urls column or task-attachments bucket is not set up. Run supabase/add_task_attachments.sql or npm run db:apply-task-attachments.
errors.boardsTable: The public.boards table has not been created in this Supabase project.
errors.boardMembersTable: The members table is missing. Run supabase/add_board_members.sql or npm run db:apply-board-members.
errors.boardsApi: The “boards” table was not found in the API (schema or migration not applied).
